texto: Everything is Not Lost, We always judge the present situation the way it is and we become judgemental rather than trying to analyse. We need to keep hopes,circumstances may change. Its true that life throws us in some tough situations and that is not the end, in short Everything is still not lost.
explicacao: Citação de Nitesh Kammar sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Everything is Not Lost, We always judge the present situation the way it is and we become judgeme…” articula reflexao, life-philosophy, everything em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
